creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Huskers from comment #42)

There is also science/py-tensorflow2 but it doesn't look like it builds.

TensorFlow uses Google tool Bazel. Basel based projects are extremely fragile and only build reliably inside of Google. Both ports worked at some point, and broke later. They are very difficult to fix. And Google won't provide cmake scripts for TensorFlow.
